content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — user-visible Swift string labels a shipping feature "Experimental" in App/SettingsView.swift:14
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 rejects builds whose store-facing UI implies the app is unfinished or beta. The Settings toggle shows "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order," which is visible to end users and may trigger review questions about whether this is a beta feature. Consider rephrasing to describe the feature without "experimental"/"unstable" wording, or clarify it as an optional advanced setting.
